SEARCH
Package search

Class HackerNewsController

java.lang.Object
search.HackerNewsController
@Controller public class HackerNewsController extends Object
This class handles requests related to indexing and searching Hacker News stories. It provides endpoints to index top stories, user stories, and the top 30 stories. The indexed URLs are stored using a ClientService instance.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    HackerNewsController(ClientService client)
    Constructor for the HackerNewsController class.

    Indexes the top 30 stories from Hacker News.
    String

  • Constructor Details

    • HackerNewsController

      public HackerNewsController(ClientService client)
      Constructor for the HackerNewsController class.
      Parameters:
      client - The ClientService instance to use for indexing URLs.

  • Method Details

    • indexHackerNewsTopStories

      @GetMapping("/index-hackernewstopstories") public String indexHackerNewsTopStories(@RequestParam String searchTerm, @RequestParam(defaultValue="1") int page)
      Indexes the top stories from Hacker News based on a search term.
      Parameters:
      searchTerm - The search term to filter stories.
      page - The page number for pagination.
      Returns:
      A redirect to the results page with the search term and page number.

    • indexUserStories

      @GetMapping("/index-user-stories") public String indexUserStories(@RequestParam String username, @RequestParam(defaultValue="1") int page)
      Indexes the user stories from Hacker News based on a username.
      Parameters:
      username - The username to filter stories.
      page - The page number for pagination.
      Returns:
      A redirect to the results page with the search term and page number.

    • indexTop30HackerNewsStories

      @GetMapping("/index-hackernews-top30") public String indexTop30HackerNewsStories(org.springframework.web.servlet.mvc.support.RedirectAttributes redirectAttributes)
      Indexes the top 30 stories from Hacker News.
      Parameters:
      redirectAttributes - The redirect attributes to pass messages.
      Returns:
      A redirect to the home page with a success message.
